checks.description: Guardrail: outputs must satisfy division relationship for all legal inputs without assuming fixed latency.
checks.pass_condition: For any stable input pair (A,B) with B != 0, result must equal floor(A/B) and odd must equal A - result*B. When B == 0, no specific numeric relationship is required, but outputs must remain defined per contract.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge case stimulus applies boundary values to A and B.

checks.pass_condition: After inputs A and B settle, the combinational outputs result and odd reflect the division of A by B: result = floor(A/B) for B != 0, odd = A - result*B. For B == 0, outputs may be any defined value but must not toggle unpredictably.
checks.trigger_condition: When basic stimulus drives representative legal A and B values.
